spec.description: UniFi Poller v2.0.1 Displays detailed information for security gateways in a UniFi network using Prometheus.
PPS on the LAN interface. Rx is on the negative axis.
spec.title: LAN Packets

spec.description: Spikes on this graph that are missing from the LAN graph indicate gateway-originated traffic, like a scheduled speed test. Rx is on the negative axis.
spec.title: WAN Throughput

spec.description: Spikes on this graph that do not appear on the WAN graph indicate inter-VLAN-routing. Rx is on the negative axis.
spec.title: LAN Throughput

spec.description: PPS on the WAN interface. Rx is on the negative axis.
spec.title: WAN Packets

spec.description: May show problems with your WAN interface. Rx on negative axis.
spec.title: WAN Drops & Errors
